hook: Your title is replaceable. Your context isn't.
caption:
Your title is replaceable. Your context isn't.

AI can read the strategy doc. It cannot know which VP quietly kills every initiative. It cannot know why Q3 actually failed. It cannot know who to call before the meeting.

That knowledge lives in you. The moment you walk out the door, it walks with you.

This is your moat. Not your credentials. Not your output. The patterns, the politics, the unwritten rules accumulated over years in rooms.

Most people leave a job and leave their context behind. The ones who go fractional take it with them. That is why they charge more. Map what you know before you leave.

#humanedge #futureofwork #fractionalwork #aiandwork #irreplaceable
